title: quercus × drummondii
intro: Quercus × drummondii, also known as the Texas red oak or the Blackjack oak, is a hybrid tree species that is native to North America. The leaves of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Quercus × drummondii include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
